name: execution-types
description: Create ISqlExecutor interface and SqlExecutorConfig types for database execution abstraction
acceptanceCriteria: ISqlExecutor interface defines execute([sql, params]): Promise<Row[]> signature
SqlExecutorConfig type defines connection configuration (connectionString, poolSize?, etc.)
Row type is generic Record<string, unknown> for flexibility
Interface is database-agnostic (no Bun.sql or Postgres-specific types in interface)
